details: SSO login via Okta SAML (MFA verified). Session initiated from 10.0.1.42.
Created key sales-deal-intel for dept-sales. Permissions: inference:read, inference:write, usage:read.
Emergency rotation of eng-prod-inference following unauthorized IP alert (alert-004). Previous key invalidated immediately.
Acknowledged Ops token spike alert. Confirmed as scheduled re-indexing job. No further action required.
Budget for Marketing increased from $32,000 to $38,000 for Q1 2026. Approved via FINOPS-2841.
GPT-5.4 access restricted to org-admin and dept-lead roles only. General user access pending cost review. Policy effective immediately.
GPT-5.4 access expanded to Research and Engineering dept-leads following Q1 budget approval. Marketing and Sales remain restricted.
Role changed from dept-lead (Engineering) to org-admin. Triggered by engineering team lead promotion effective 2026-02-01.
Revoked legacy-eng-v1. Key was inactive since 2025-12-30 and predates the current key naming policy. Cleanup as part of Q1 security audit.
quotaThreshold updated from 80 to 85. alertEmail updated to billing-alerts@company.com. Change approved in FINOPS-2809.
Model Eval Suite status changed from paused to active. Budget restored after Q1 research allocation approved by dept head.
Exported January 2026 usage report as CSV (all departments). File size: 1.2 MB. Downloaded from 10.0.2.88.
SSO login via Okta SAML (MFA verified). Session from 10.0.4.11.
Automated alert generated: Research (RES-002) crossed the 88% budget utilization threshold. Alert-002 created.
January 2026 invoice finalized. Total: $147,842.60. Line items across 6 departments and 10 models. PDF generated and emailed to billing-alerts@company.com.
Created research-rag-indexer key for RAG Pipeline v2 project. Scoped to embeddings:write only per least-privilege policy.
alertEmail changed from it-ops@company.com to billing-alerts@company.com to align with FinOps team routing.
